name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a tiger dressed as a witch and a cat dressed as a witch. The main character was tiger, house at play. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 (the girl) went out to her kitchen in the morning carrying milk for breakfast. On going down she passed through several houses on horseback - first one had three cats; then another two men who would not answer their callings but were just waiting with toys or food while they waited till lunchtime came around again... When all this happened it struck me that I could have been any child living anywhere! So when you come home from school today find yourself standing outside your front door looking into empty rooms so full of people now watching television programs etc.. You know how busy life can be? Then imagine my surprise whenever suddenly something seemed odd about someone else.... This is what happens sometimes during our daily lives . Sometimes we don't notice some strange person staring us straight in eyes which makes us wonder if he has seen an animal before..... But once more after pondering these questions...... We decide never go back inside without leaving behind such things !
